void_v0.doc: The SobreContract wasm hash this factory currently deploys instances of.\nSwappable by the admin via `set_sobre_wasm` so new families get the\nlatest contract code without redeploying the factory itself.
void_v0.name: Wasm

void_v0.doc: Monotonic counter used to derive a unique salt for every deploy.
void_v0.name: NextSalt

tuple_v0.doc: admin \xe2\x86\x92 Vec<Address> of Sobre contracts they have created.
tuple_v0.name: AdminSobres

void_v0.doc: Factory owner. Has rights to flip the wasm pointer.
void_v0.name: Admin

function_v0.doc:
One-time setup. Binds the SobreContract wasm hash this factory deploys
+ the factory admin (the only address allowed to swap that wasm hash
later). For the hackathon the admin is a single key; production should
move this to a Stellar multisig or a governance contract.
function_v0.name: init

event_v0.doc: Emitted when the admin swaps the SobreContract wasm hash that future\ndeploys (and per-instance upgrades) will pick up.
event_v0.name: WasmUpdated

function_v0.doc:
Deploy a new SobreContract instance and call its constructor with the
caller as admin. Returns the freshly deployed contract address. The
factory's own address is supplied as the last constructor arg so the
new instance knows where to ask for its current wasm hash on upgrade.
function_v0.name: create_sobre

function_v0.doc:
Admin-only. Swap the SobreContract wasm hash future `create_sobre`
calls and existing per-instance `upgrade()` calls will pick up. Same
factory address, same `AdminSobres` directory, new code for new + opted-in
instances.
function_v0.name: set_sobre_wasm

function_v0.doc: View. Lists every Sobre this address has created via this factory.
function_v0.name: sobres_of_admin

function_v0.doc: View. The wasm hash a fresh `create_sobre` would deploy right now, and\nthe hash an existing SobreContract's `upgrade()` will read.
function_v0.name: current_sobre_wasm
